title: Year and Race-Year interaction handling
summary: Make Year, Race, and Race-Year interactions first-class categorical features because pit-stop prevalence and strategy patterns differ strongly by season and circuit.
rationale: Raw-data inspection showed major season and race-specific shifts, and the run repeatedly retained Race-Year context. Explicit interactions can capture systematic strategy regimes without relying only on high-cardinality driver noise.
implementation_hint: Create Race_Year, Compound_Year, Race_Compound, and coarse Year-by-race-phase interactions. In validation, report random stratified AUC and Race-Year-grouped AUC to ensure interactions are not merely memorizing one split.
expected_effect: Small to medium AUC gain with medium-high confidence for in-distribution test rows.
risk: Race-Year interactions can overfit if validation splits identical race-year contexts randomly. Grouped validation is required for a realistic robustness check.
